news.title:
Promoter group members of PNC Infratech transferred 1.96 crore shares via off-market deals.
The transfer was part of a partition among promoters; total promoter holding post-transaction remains 56.07%.
news.summary:
Promoter group members of PNC Infratech transferred 1.96 crore shares via off-market deals.
The transfer was part of a partition among promoters; total promoter holding post-transaction remains 56.07%.

news.title:
PNC Infratech sold 12 SPVs, including PNC Challakere Highways, for Rs. 683.8 crore.
The deal includes Rs. 80.5 crore equity and was made with Vertis Infrastructure Trust.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech sold 12 SPVs, including PNC Challakere Highways, for Rs. 683.8 crore.
The deal includes Rs. 80.5 crore equity and was made with Vertis Infrastructure Trust.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed PNC Infratech's credit ratings: CARE AA (Stable) for Rs. 1,700 Cr long-term and CARE A1 for Rs. 5,000 Cr short-term facilities.
Total rated facilities amount to Rs. 6,700 Cr. The announcement complies with SEBI LODR Regulation 30 disclosure requirements.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed PNC Infratech's credit ratings: CARE AA (Stable) for Rs. 1,700 Cr long-term and CARE A1 for Rs. 5,000 Cr short-term facilities.
Total rated facilities amount to Rs. 6,700 Cr. The announcement complies with SEBI LODR Regulation 30 disclosure requirements.

news.title:
PNC Infratech Ltd receives ESG rating of 39 from SEBI-registered agency.
Rating prepared independently using public domain data; company not involved in evaluation.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech Ltd receives ESG rating of 39 from SEBI-registered agency.
Rating prepared independently using public domain data; company not involved in evaluation.

news.title:
PNC Infratech held an earnings call on Feb 10, 2026, discussing Q3 and 9-month results.
Audio recording is available on their website; transcript to be shared soon.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech held an earnings call on Feb 10, 2026, discussing Q3 and 9-month results.
Audio recording is available on their website; transcript to be shared soon.

news.title:
PNC Infratech reports Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs.1,056 Cr with strategic diversification.
The company holds an order book worth Rs.19,346 Cr.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech reports Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs.1,056 Cr with strategic diversification.
The company holds an order book worth Rs.19,346 Cr.

news.title:
PNC Infratech fined Rs.35,400 by BSE for delayed RPT disclosure for H1 ending Sept 30, 2025.
The fine was paid within 15 days; board urges timely compliance in the future.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech fined Rs.35,400 by BSE for delayed RPT disclosure for H1 ending Sept 30, 2025.
The fine was paid within 15 days; board urges timely compliance in the future.

news.title:
PNC Infratech's Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹2.4B vs ₹3.78B YoY.
EBITDA margin dropped to 19.9% from 25.8% YoY.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech's Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹2.4B vs ₹3.78B YoY.
EBITDA margin dropped to 19.9% from 25.8% YoY.

news.title:
PNC Infratech approved unaudited standalone and consolidated Q3 FY26 results.
Recognised Rs 70.5L exceptional item due to Labour Code; sold equity in 11 road assets.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech approved unaudited standalone and consolidated Q3 FY26 results.
Recognised Rs 70.5L exceptional item due to Labour Code; sold equity in 11 road assets.

news.title:
PNC Infratech's subsidiary Awadh Expressway Pvt Ltd completed Kanpur Lucknow Expressway project.
Project cost Rs. 1513 Cr under Hybrid Annuity Mode; commercial operations start Oct 1, 2025.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech's subsidiary Awadh Expressway Pvt Ltd completed Kanpur Lucknow Expressway project.
Project cost Rs. 1513 Cr under Hybrid Annuity Mode; commercial operations start Oct 1, 2025.

news.title:
Budget 2026 focuses on road stocks like L&T, Dilip Buildcon, IRB Infra, and PNC Infratech, despite 8.4% lower capex of Rs 10.2L cr.
Govt targets 26,000 km High-Speed Corridor by FY33; digital tools, stricter norms, and PPP projects aim to boost logistics efficiency.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 focuses on road stocks like L&T, Dilip Buildcon, IRB Infra, and PNC Infratech, despite 8.4% lower capex of Rs 10.2L cr.
Govt targets 26,000 km High-Speed Corridor by FY33; digital tools, stricter norms, and PPP projects aim to boost logistics efficiency.

news.title:
PNC Infratech board meeting on Feb 9, 2026, to review Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours post financial result declaration.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech board meeting on Feb 9, 2026, to review Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours post financial result declaration.

news.title:
PNC Infratech announced reaffirmed credit ratings by CARE Ratings for its subsidiaries.
Akkalkot Highways received CARE A Stable, and PNC Raebareli Highways got CARE AA Stable ratings.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech announced reaffirmed credit ratings by CARE Ratings for its subsidiaries.
Akkalkot Highways received CARE A Stable, and PNC Raebareli Highways got CARE AA Stable ratings.

news.title:
PNC Infratech's market assessment revised amid financial and technical challenges.
Construction sector pressures impact PNC Infratech's valuation and outlook.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech's market assessment revised amid financial and technical challenges.
Construction sector pressures impact PNC Infratech's valuation and outlook.

news.title:
FM Nirmala Sitharaman held pre-budget talks with energy, infra leaders for Union Budget 2026-27.
Key entities like CREDAI, L&T, Borosil Renewables, and GMR Group participated in the consultation.
news.summary:
FM Nirmala Sitharaman held pre-budget talks with energy, infra leaders for Union Budget 2026-27.
Key entities like CREDAI, L&T, Borosil Renewables, and GMR Group participated in the consultation.

news.title:
PNC Infratech Ltd discusses Q2 FY26 results amid modest road activity, with 644km vs 802km YoY.
NHAI targets 6,300km project awards FY26; company updates on awards and financials.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech Ltd discusses Q2 FY26 results amid modest road activity, with 644km vs 802km YoY.
NHAI targets 6,300km project awards FY26; company updates on awards and financials.

news.title:
PNC Infratech Q2 net profit rose to ₹2.16B from ₹834.5M YoY.
Revenue fell to ₹11.28B from ₹14.27B YoY; EBITDA margin down to 22.4%.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech Q2 net profit rose to ₹2.16B from ₹834.5M YoY.
Revenue fell to ₹11.28B from ₹14.27B YoY; EBITDA margin down to 22.4%.

news.title:
Voting on 5 plans for Jaiprakash Associates begins; Vedanta leads in value, Adani offers highest upfront payment.
Vedanta's bid valued at ₹12,505 crore NPV; Adani's at ₹12,050 crore NPV. Other contenders include Dalmia, PNC, Jindal Power.
news.summary:
Voting on 5 plans for Jaiprakash Associates begins; Vedanta leads in value, Adani offers highest upfront payment.
Vedanta's bid valued at ₹12,505 crore NPV; Adani's at ₹12,050 crore NPV. Other contenders include Dalmia, PNC, Jindal Power.

news.title:
Adani Enterprises likely to outbid Vedanta for Jaiprakash Associates acquisition.
Adani's 2-year payment plan surpasses Vedanta's 5-year proposal in insolvency process.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises likely to outbid Vedanta for Jaiprakash Associates acquisition.
Adani's 2-year payment plan surpasses Vedanta's 5-year proposal in insolvency process.

news.title:
PNC Infratech Ltd to hold Q2FY26 earnings conference call hosted by PhillipCapital.
Call scheduled for 13th Nov 2025 at 3 PM IST, led by key company executives.
news.summary:
PNC Infratech Ltd to hold Q2FY26 earnings conference call hosted by PhillipCapital.
Call scheduled for 13th Nov 2025 at 3 PM IST, led by key company executives.
